results.draft:
Subject: Re: FG-1001 - false positive on CVE-2024-1234

Hi there,

Thanks for flagging this. Most false positives like this trace back to an outdated plugin signature, and re-running the scan after the next signature update usually clears it.

If CVE-2024-1234 still shows up after that update, let us know and we'll suppress it manually with a documented reason so it stops flagging on future scans. Can you confirm which scanner version you're running, so we can check when your next signature update lands?

Best,
The Ferngate Security Team

Subject: Re: Expanding asset coverage for your new office

Adding a new office is a good moment to plan asset coverage properly rather than just extend it as-is. The right approach depends on how many new assets you're bringing on and how they'll fit into your current licensing tier.

We'd like to loop in your account team for a short planning conversation, that way we can map out the new office's coverage against your existing setup and flag any licensing changes before they become a scramble. Can you let us know roughly how many assets (devices, endpoints, etc.) the new office will add?

Best,
The Ferngate Security Team

results.draft:
Subject: Re: Pricing tiers request

Hi there,

We offer three self-serve tiers: Starter, Growth, and Business, each scaled by the number of protected assets and level of monitoring support included. Starter covers basic scanning and alerting for smaller teams, Growth adds broader asset coverage and priority response times, and Business includes full coverage plus dedicated support hours.

At around 30 people, your asset count may put you in range for volume-based Enterprise pricing, which can work out more cost-effective than stacking Business licenses. Happy to set up a short call to go through your current asset count and match you to the right tier. Let us know a time that works.

Best,
The Ferngate Security Team

results.draft:
Subject: Re: Pricing tiers request

Hi there,

At 800 employees, you're likely covering a large enough asset count that our published self-serve tiers won't give you the best fit. Those tiers scale by device count and feature set, from basic endpoint monitoring up through advanced threat response, but they're built with smaller deployments in mind.

For a rollout your size, we'd put together custom volume-based pricing under an Enterprise agreement, which also includes dedicated onboarding support and priority response times. Let's set up a short call this week to walk through your environment and put together a proposal that fits.

Best,
The Ferngate Security Team
